TruthGPT Bridge

BSC $TRUTH

ETH $TRUTH

Bridging Information:

To bridge your $TRUTH, connect your wallet to our bridging dapp
1. Approve $TRUTH
2. Set Bridging Amount
3. Submit Transaction
4. BRIDGING FEE OF .05 BNB

Disclaimer!


- $TRUTH on the Ethereum network will be sent to the same wallet address
- Please make sure you are using a multi-coin wallet where BSC and ETH have the same address (ex. MetaMask or TrustWallet)
- BRIDGING FEE OF .05 BNB

After successfully bridging, view your $TRUTH on the Ethereum network

Scan to connect with one of our mobile apps

Coinbase Wallet app

Connect with your self-custody wallet

Coinbase app

Connect with your Coinbase account

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
